race.comment: SEVEN DAY REBELS (10) will find this a little easier than his second on debut two-and-a-half weeks ago, beaten 5.5 lengths at the end of 1000m at Bendigo behind impressive winner Panchenko who was heavily supported in a good race at Flemington on Saturday. That form should hold up nicely. KEEN OBSERVER (9) is on debut for the Trent Busuttin & Natalie Young stable, by Ole Kirk and well related on the dam's side. He's been jumping out very well and looks ready to rumble. AZZURRI QUEEN (7) is a nicely bred filly by sire Blue Point from the stakes-winning mare Vain Queen who has trialled well for the Laurie yard and looks a live chance. DELAVEGA (11) was well in the market on debut last time out and ran well but found a couple better over 1000m at Pakenham Synthetic. Can improve and is in the mix.
